tbl_description: One row per ZooScan PRPOOS net-tow sample: a station occupation on a CalCOFI/CCE-LTER cruise (lines 80, 87, 90), 2005-present, with position, time, day/night, and resolved cruise/ship/site keys. Samples were optically imaged with a ZooScan and machine-classified. Source: SIO Ocean Informatics ZooScan portal PRPOOS plot CGI (oceaninformatics.ucsd.edu/zooscandb), per-station values.

ZooScan imaging metrics in long form: one row per (sample, taxon, measurement_type). measurement_type is zooscan_abundance (No./m2), zooscan_biomass_carbon (mgC/m2), zooscan_feret_diameter (mm, mean organism size), or zooscan_carbon_individual (ugC per individual). measurement_value=0 means the class was imaged-but-absent at that sample.

Image-classification lookup for the 23 ZooScan PRPOOS bioclasses, with the verbatim class name, a taxon_slug join key, and a best-effort WoRMS aphia_id + accepted name/rank/classification. Four classes are non-taxonomic operational categories (eggs, multiples, nauplii, others) and two are combined groups (cnidaria_ctenophores, pteropoda_heteropoda); see taxon_note.
